heading: Rules and regulations
label: 28505 Rules and regulations
text: Within 1 year after the date of enactment of this section, the Board shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this section, referred to in text, is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 110–432Oct. 16, 2008
